omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
Personalized Ads
As described in our terms of service, our Software is ad-supported. Ads help us keep the lights on
and continue to provide free products for our users. In order to provide our news services and
serve targeted ads, we collect data such as advertising IDs from your device and your general
location, as well as data you submit to us if you choose to create or update a user profile (such as
your name, birth date, phone contact list, occupation, etc.). These targeted ads are provided by
our monetization partners. We process this data based on your consent. You can always adjust
your personalized ad choices or withdraw your consent in the application's "Settings" menu.
